descriptions: Members of the Straight Satans and Night Riders were implicated together in a sexual assault incident.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1972, members of several Southern California motorcycle gangs—including the Straight Satans, ... and Night Riders from Glendale—were implicated...

descriptions: Crips had disputes with The Drill Company.
edges.evidence_quote: sparking disputes with non-Crip gangs, including the L.A. Brims, Athens Park Boys, the Bishops, The Drill Company, and the Denver Lanes.

descriptions: Clan Serra was a satellite group of Clan Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Serra , da Pagani , soprannominato cartuccia , figlioccio di Carmine Alfieri , capo di un gruppo satellite operante in alcuni comuni dell' agro nocerino-sarnese , in lotta col clan del cutoliano Salvatore Di Maio .

descriptions: Los Granados is a splinter group of Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: Fragmentación ... - Los Granados en las municipalidades de Ixtapa y Zihuatanejo en el Estado de Guerrero .

descriptions: The Constitutional Bar was established as an alternative to the legitimate UNBR, indicating a rival or conflicting relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The Constitutional Bar ... was a parallel, illegal bar, bereft of juridical personhood, established by Pompiliu Bota in 2002 as an alternative to the 'classic bars' of Romanian lawyers, reorganized after 1990 within UNBR, which is the genuine Romanian bar association.

Yamaken-gumi.description: The Yamaken-gumi is a yakuza gang based in Kobe, Japan, founded in 1961 by Kenichi Yamamoto. It was the largest affiliate of the Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015, when it withdrew to form the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi. In 2020 it became independent, and in 2021 it was welcomed back as the umbrella organization of the Yamaguchi-gumi. Membership dropped from an estimated 3,000-7,000 to around 800 after the split.

descriptions: Yama-kengumi leader Kunio Inoue joined Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: he left the sixth-generation Yamaguchi-gumi and formed a new organization, the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, with more than a dozen members, including Kunio Inoue (assistant to the sixth-generation Yamaguchi-gumi Wakatou and fourth-generation Yama-kengumi).

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi was a constituent group within Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi yakuza organization included Kobe -based Yamaken-gumi

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is a major internal rival of Kodo-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Yamaken-gumi had been a major internal rival of the Kodo-kai

descriptions: Kodo-kai is compared to Yamaken-gumi as a fellow affiliate, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: it is the second-largest Yamaguchi affiliate after the Yamaken-gumi

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai's president maintained a close relationship with Yamaken-gumi's president.
edges.evidence_quote: The second president Namikawa has allegedly maintained a close relationship with Kunio Inoue. Inoue is the president of the fourth-generation Yamaken-gumi

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi members attacked Oda-gumi by crashing a car into its offices.
edges.evidence_quote: The recent split between Yamaguchi-gumi and Watanabe's former Yamaken-gumi faction has again brought the Tsukasa aligned Oda-gumi into the spotlight as members of the Yamaken faction, Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, deliberately crashed a car into Oda-gumi's offices in March 2016.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is an internal rival of Kodo-kai within Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Yamaken-gumi had been a major internal rival of the Kodo-kai especially since Takayama and Tsukasa joined the headquarters of the Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi broke away from Yamaguchi-gumi in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: powerful factions, including the Kobe-based Yamaken-gumi, the Osaka-based Takumi-gumi, and the Kyoyu-kai, broke away from the Yamaguchi-gumi and formed a new group called the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Second kumicho Yoshinori Watanabe was first kaicho of Kenryu-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: He was 1st kaicho ( 会長 ) of the Kenryu-kai ( 健竜会 )

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi was a founding member and under the umbrella of Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi from 2015 to 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2015, the Yamaken-gumi, along with several other organisations, withdrew from the Yamaguchi-gumi and formed the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi . From 2015 to 2020, it was under the umbrella of the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Both were affiliates of Yamaguchi-gumi, with Yamaken-gumi being larger.
edges.evidence_quote: It was the largest affiliate, followed by the Nagoya -based Kodo-kai , of the largest known yakuza syndicate in Japan, the Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi founder attacked the rival Tanizaki-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: he was involved in an attack on the rival Tanizaki-gumi in September 1954

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is a subordinate group within the Yamaguchi-gumi, as Kuwata held leadership roles in both.
edges.evidence_quote: Kaneyoshi Kuwata ... was the fifth generation wakagashira of the Yamaguchi-gumi , was the third kumicho of the Yamaken-gumi yakuza gang

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is an affiliate (subsidiary) of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: the largest and most powerful affiliate gang of the Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is an affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoue is the president of the fourth-generation Yamaken-gumi , an affiliate of the largest-known Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi was the largest affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: It was the largest affiliate, followed by the Nagoya -based Kodo-kai , of the largest known yakuza syndicate in Japan, the Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi members were welcomed back by Yamaguchi-gumi in 2021, making Yamaken-gumi the umbrella organization again.
edges.evidence_quote: On 16 September 2021, the Yamaguchi-gumi announced that it will be welcoming back Yamaken-gumi members who had disunited from them in 2015. As a result, the Yamaken-gumi once again became the umbrella organisation of the Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is a subgroup of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Yoshinori Watanabe joined the Yamaken Gumi, a subgroup of the Yamaguchi Gumi Yakuza

descriptions: Founder Kenichi Yamamoto was a former member of Yasuhara-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: He was a former member of Yasuhara-kai ( 安原会 ) .

Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club.description: White supremacist outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2010 by ex-KKK member Dennis McGiffen. Acts as the militant wing of Aryan Nations, with chapters across the US and several other countries. Listed as an active neo-Nazi group by the Southern Poverty Law Center since 2014.

descriptions: The club claims to be the militant arm of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: According to their official website, the club claims to be the "militant arm" of Aryan Nations.

descriptions: The club formally merged with Aryan Nations in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, SSMC formally merged with Aryan Nations.

descriptions: The club is part of a coalition with The Creativity Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Their club's motto, "The Black & Silver Solution"', is the phrase given to represent a coalition of several racist organizations with the United Klans of America and The Creativity Movement.

descriptions: The club is part of a coalition with United Klans of America.
edges.evidence_quote: Their club's motto, "The Black & Silver Solution"', is the phrase given to represent a coalition of several racist organizations with the United Klans of America and The Creativity Movement.

descriptions: Tottenham Boys funneled profits to PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: A British police report revealed that the Tottenham Boys, a Kurdish gang from London, did funnel their profits to the PKK.

descriptions: The Palermiti clan, as part of the Parisi-Palermiti alliance, fought against the Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: conflitto scoppiato nel quartiere contro la compagine 'scissionista' capeggiata da Antonio Busco

descriptions: The Palermiti clan joined the Parisi clan in 2017, forming a joint criminal society.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2017 al clan Parisi si è unito il clan Palermiti, dando vita a una 'società della guerra'

descriptions: The Palermiti clan merged with the Parisi clan to form a joint criminal society.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2017, the Palermiti clan has joined the Parisi clan, giving life to a 'war society'

descriptions: The Red Knights were formed to oppose the Klan and engaged in violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: The Red Knights, a militant group formed in opposition to the Klan, responded violently to Klan provocations on several occasions.

descriptions: Taliban forms alliances with People's Liberation Army.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban form alliances with gangs ( People's Liberation Army and the Group of 41 ) of the Kalenjin tribe

Soriano.description: The Soriano are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filandari, Vibo Valentia, Italy. They are primarily involved in drug trafficking and extortion in the municipalities of Filandari and Jonadi. They have strong ties with the Mancuso 'ndrina. The group was heavily impacted by the Genesi trial (2000) and the Rotarico operation (2007).

descriptions: Soriano wanted to eliminate Accorinti boss Giuseppe Accorinti.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2018 i carabinieri di Vibo Valentia con l'operazione Nemea arrestano a Filandari presunti elementi dei Soriano da cui emerge il voler eliminare il boss Giuseppe Accorinti

descriptions: Fiarè member Razionale was attacked in a plot involving Mancuso, who later killed Soriano's boss, indicating conflict between Fiarè and Soriano.
edges.evidence_quote: Saverio Razionale, il 25 settembre 1995 subisce un agguato ordito da Giuseppe Mancuso, detto Mbrogghja, il quale sarebbe poi l'autore materiale dell'omicidio di Roberto Soriano, capo-società dell' omonima 'ndrina della frazione Pizzinni di Filandari voluto dallo stesso Mancuso.

descriptions: The Giorgi and Soriano were targeted together in an operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Anteo contro i Giorgi, i Mancuso , i Soriano , gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio

descriptions: Iozzo-Chiefari and Soriano were both targeted in the same police operation Anteo.
edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: operazione "Anteo" contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano , gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio .

descriptions: Mancuso and Soriano were targeted together in operation Anteo, but no direct relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Anteo" contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso, i Soriano , gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio

descriptions: The text lists Sia-Procopio and Soriano as targets of the same police operation, implying a connection but not specifying the nature.
edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: Operazione "Anteo" contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano , gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio

descriptions: Soriano and Giorgi were both targeted in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: operazione Anteo contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano, gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio .

descriptions: Soriano and Iozzo-Chiefari were both targeted in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: operazione Anteo contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano, gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio .

descriptions: Soriano has strong ties with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno forti legami con la 'ndrina dei Mancuso.

descriptions: Soriano and Sia-Procopio were both targeted in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: operazione Anteo contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano, gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio .

descriptions: Soriano was in a feud with Fiaré-Razionale in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Anni '90 - La faida con i Fiaré-Razionale

descriptions: Alliance between Violi family and Bonanno associates linked to 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: A new alliance between Bonanno associates and the Violi family ... is significant, as it suggests a growing prominence for Calabrian mafia – the 'Ndrangheta – within the New York families and in Canada

descriptions: Bonanno associates formed an alliance with the Violi family, a Calabrian mafia family.
edges.evidence_quote: A new alliance between Bonanno associates and the Violi family, is significant, as it suggests a growing prominence for Calabrian mafia – the 'Ndrangheta – within the New York families and in Canada.

descriptions: The Ramashish Koeri gang cooperated with these four other gangs in committing murders.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang, along with four other caste-based gangs led by Ghamari Karwar, Rambachan Yadav, Triveni Kahar, and Gaurik was responsible for over hundred murders in the Kaimur region.

descriptions: The Matranga family was a predecessor and early rival to the Los Angeles crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The early years of organized crime in California were marked by the division of various Italian street gangs, such as the Black Hand organizations, in the early 20th century. The most prominent of these was the Matranga family.

descriptions: Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo are listed as an ally of Wagner Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo

descriptions: Wagner Group is allied with Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo

descriptions: Wagner Group allied with Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo

descriptions: Wagner allied with Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Serbian paramilitaries in Kosovo

descriptions: Rosen, head of the 69th Street Gang, partnered with Lucchese crime family boss Tommy Lucchese in a business venture.
edges.evidence_quote: During the early 1950s, Rosen became partners with Gaetano "Tommy" Lucchese after buying the Sweet Valley Improvement Company which was used by the Lucchese crime family to ship clothing out of New York's garment district.

descriptions: Keane-Collopy is in a violent feud with the Ryan Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which mainly involves the Keane-Collopys, the Ryans and the McCarthy-Dundon gang, has resulted in hundreds of violent incidents including stabbings, shootings and bomb attacks and the deaths of up to twenty people.

descriptions: The McCarthy-Dundon Gang and the Ryan Gang are both participants in the Limerick feud, which is a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which involves several criminal families, mainly the McCarthy-Dundons, the Ryans and the Keane-Collopy gang from St. Mary's Park , has been ongoing since 2000.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Ryan Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang, despite also being listed as a participant in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang , Ryan Gang

Israeli mafia.description: The Israeli mafia refers to organized crime groups operating in Israel or consisting of Israeli members. There are 16 crime families, including six Jewish and three Arab families, involved in activities such as gambling, car theft, prostitution, human trafficking, money laundering, murder, extortion, loan sharking, and drug dealing. Major groups include the Abergils, Abutbuls, Alperons, Dumranis, Shirazis, Amir Molnar, and Zeev Rosenstein syndicates. The groups have penetrated the formal economy and local governments, and a mob war in the early 2000s resulted in several bosses killed.

descriptions: Ait Soussan organisation kidnapped a trafficker who worked with Israeli mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Houssine Ait Soussan is believed to be behind the kidnapping of Abdelkader 'the Jew' Bouker, a major Belgian-Moroccan drug trafficker who worked closely together with the Israeli mafia

descriptions: British firms have the Israeli mafia as rivals according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Israeli mafia, Baybaşin family

descriptions: Infobox lists Israeli mafia as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Italian-American Mafia , Israeli mafia , Russian mafia

descriptions: The infobox lists Israeli mafia as an ally of Jewish-American organized crime.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Italian-American Mafia, Israeli mafia, Russian mafia

descriptions: Israeli Mafia is listed as an ally of Los Negros in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Israeli mafia

descriptions: Moroccan-Israeli mafia clans collaborated with the Mocro Maffia in drug distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: Moroccan-Israeli mafia clans are known for having collaborated closely together with the Mocro Maffia in the Netherlands and Belgium, especially in the worldwide distribution of synthetic drugs such as MDMA.

descriptions: Israeli mafia is listed as an ally of the Serbian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Albanian mafia , American Mafia , Camorra , Bulgarian mafia , Corsican mafia , Dutch organized crime , Greek mafia , Gulf Cartel , Irish mob , Israeli mafia , Medellín Cartel , Montenegrin mafia , Moroccan mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Macedonian mafia , Romanian mafia , Russian mafia , Sacra Corona Unita , Sicilian Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Serbian mafia is allied with Israeli mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Israeli mafia

descriptions: The infobox lists Israeli mafia as an ally of Serbian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Albanian mafia , American Mafia , Camorra , Bulgarian mafia , Corsican mafia , Dutch organized crime , Greek mafia , Gulf Cartel , Irish mob , Israeli mafia , Medellín Cartel , Montenegrin mafia , Moroccan mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Macedonian mafia , Romanian mafia , Russian mafia , Sacra Corona Unita , Sicilian Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Serbian mafia members cooperated with Israeli mafia in a marijuana smuggling operation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 June 2009, six Serbs were convicted, together with several Israelis , in smuggling of 12.5 ton (£36m) marijuana , orchestrated by the Israeli mafia .

descriptions: Hamas is part of the Palestinian Joint Operations Room.
edges.evidence_quote: Political alliance: Alliance of Palestinian Forces, Palestinian Joint Operations Room

descriptions: Hamas is in a political alliance with the Palestinian Joint Operations Room.
edges.evidence_quote: Political alliance: Palestinian Joint Operations Room

descriptions: Hamas is part of the Palestinian Joint Operations Room.
edges.evidence_quote: Political alliance: Alliance of Palestinian Forces , Palestinian Joint Operations Room

descriptions: PIJ is part of the Palestinian Joint Operations Room.
edges.evidence_quote: Part of: Palestinian Joint Operations Room

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Be Like Boys, meaning the Be Like Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: Jack Spot's organization succeeded Sabinis after WWII.
edges.evidence_quote: his empire was taken over by the White family led by Alf White and subsequently by the organisations of Jack Spot and Billy Hill

descriptions: Locale di Africo is a local clan of 'Ndrangheta involved in cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono stati sequestrati nel 2007 250 chili di cocaina provenienti dal Sud America e in transito a Dakar in Senegal che sarebbero dovuti arrivare in Italia per conto dei Morabito e della Locale di Africo

Rock Machine Motorcycle Club.description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Montreal, Canada in 1986 by Salvatore Cazzetta and his brother Giovanni. It competed with the Hells Angels for control of the Quebec drug trade, leading to the Quebec Biker War (1994-2002) with over 160 deaths. The club briefly became a chapter of the Bandidos from 2000-2001, but was refounded in 2008. As of 2022, it has over 120 chapters worldwide.

descriptions: Bandidos and Rock Machine were in conflict in Ulm and Neu-Ulm.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos have been involved in a conflict with the Rock Machine in Ulm and Neu-Ulm which started after Suat Erköse, a former Bandidos member, formed a Rock Machine chapter in the area in early 2011.

descriptions: Bandidos and Rock Machine feuded after members switched sides.
edges.evidence_quote: A feud emerged between the Rock Machine and the Bandidos after several Bandidos members reportedly patched over to the Rock Machine.

descriptions: Rock Machine MC is listed as both ally and rival in infobox; edge for rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Bandidos are allied with Rock Machine in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos , Mobshitters , and Rock Machine

descriptions: The text states the Bandidos are allied with the Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos , Mobshitters and Rock Machine

descriptions: Bandidos are allied with Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos , Mobshitters and Rock Machine

descriptions: Rock Machine merged into Bandidos as Quebec chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The Montreal -based Rock Machine "patched over" as the Bandidos Quebec chapter in December 2000

descriptions: Bandidos patched over a Rock Machine branch to form a chapter in New Zealand.
edges.evidence_quote: A second chapter was established after the club patched over a branch of the Rock Machine in Christchurch in November 2013.

descriptions: Bandidos absorbed a Rock Machine chapter in Perth in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos established their first branch in Western Australia by patching-over a Rock Machine chapter in Perth on 20 October 2013.

descriptions: Bandidos merged with Rock Machine in 2000 to expand into Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos embarked on a failed endeavour to establish themselves in Canada after merging with the Montreal-based Rock Machine Motorcycle Club in 2000.

descriptions: Black Jackets and Rock Machine are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine , Veles gang , Black Dogs , Bandogs , 210 International , Dogpack 416 , Black Army , Holmblaaa , Kommando 210

descriptions: Rock Machine patched over Comanchero members, causing tension and conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of Rock Machine chapters in New South Wales had reported links to a Serbian organized crime group and used that influence to patch over members of the Comanchero Motorcycle Club in mid 2012, causing tension with existing Sydney Comancheros.

descriptions: The Rock Machine is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Dark Circle was Rock Machine's death squad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dark Circle has often been described as Rock Machine 's death squad.

descriptions: The Dark Circle, founded by ex-Devil's Disciples, was Rock Machine's death squad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dark Circle has often been described as Rock Machine 's death squad.

descriptions: Perth Finks were patched over by Mongols MC and Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2013 the Perth Finks were patched over by the Mongols MC and Rock Machine.

descriptions: Hells Angels fought a turf war against the Rock Machine and its alliance during the Quebec Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War was a violent turf war that began in 1994 and continued until late 2002 in Quebec. The war began when the Hells Angels in Quebec began to try to establish a monopoly on street-level drug sales in Quebec. Many drug dealers and crime families resisted and established groups such as the 'Alliance to fight the Angels', led by the Rock Machine.

descriptions: Hells Angels and Rock Machine fought a violent biker war from 1994 to 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker war between the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine began in 1994 and continued until late 2002 and claimed more than 162 lives, including innocent bystanders.

descriptions: Rock Machine is a rival gang to Hells Angels, as indicated by an ally insulting Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: A former member of the Zig Zag Crew, Fat Corey, who had allied himself with the Rock Machine was heard to make insulting remarks about the Hells Angels.

descriptions: The two groups were engaged in a violent gang war from 1994 to 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal ... between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.

descriptions: The two groups were engaged in a violent gang war for control of the Montreal drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, lasting from 1994 to 2002, between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.

descriptions: The two groups were at war from 1994 to 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal ... between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.

descriptions: The two clubs were engaged in a violent gang war for control of the drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, lasting from 1994 to 2002, between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.

descriptions: The two groups were engaged in a violent gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal ... between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.

descriptions: Hells Angels and Rock Machine were rivals in a gang war over drug turf.
edges.evidence_quote: Territory of the Hells Angels and Rock Machine began to overlap with one another which incited much conflict between the two before a large-scale gang war broke in 1994 .

descriptions: Some Rock Machine members joined Hells Angels in a patch-over ceremony.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 December 2000, most of the Ontario biker gangs in a mass 'patch over' ... joined the Hells Angels.

descriptions: The Loners allied with the Rock Machine against the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Loners Motorcycle Club aligned themselves with fellow Canadian motorcycle club.

descriptions: Rock Machine MC listed as ally of Outlaws in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Nations, Bandidos MC, Black Pistons MC, Breed MC, Buffalo crime family, Chicago Outfit, Detroit Partnership, Grim Reapers MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Hammerskins, New Orleans crime family, Pittsburgh crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Outlaws maintain an alliance with the Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: They also maintain an alliance with fellow Hells Angels rivals, the Rock Machine.

descriptions: Rock Machine MC listed as an ally of Outlaws MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Rock Machine MC as an ally of Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Nations , Bandidos MC , Black Pistons MC , Breed MC , Buffalo crime family , Chicago Outfit , Detroit Partnership , Grim Reapers MC , Gypsy Joker MC , Hammerskins , New Orleans crime family , Pittsburgh crime family , Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Outlaws MC is allied with Rock Machine MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Nations , Bandidos MC , Black Pistons MC , Breed MC , Buffalo crime family , Chicago Outfit , Detroit Partnership , Grim Reapers MC , Gypsy Joker MC , Hammerskins , New Orleans crime family , Pittsburgh crime family , Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Pagans supported Rock Machine as a rival to Hells Angels and met with them in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: It also found the idea of supporting Hells Angels rivals beneficial, such as the Rock Machine Motorcycle Club ; a Canadian-based international motorcycle club with chapters all over the world, it has fought several conflicts with the Hells Angels including the Quebec Biker War , the deadliest motorcycle conflict in history. In 2011, dozens of the Pagans traveled to the Canadian province of New Brunswick to meet with the Rock Machine .

descriptions: Violent feud between Rebels and Rock Machine involving firebombings, assaults, and assassination attempts.
edges.evidence_quote: The defection of Rebels MC members to the Rock Machine MC sparked an ongoing violent feud between the groups, when the Rock Machine settled in Perth in 2009 there were allegations by media that a turf war broke out between the two rival motorcycle clubs, with exchanges between the two groups including firebombings, assaults and the assassination attempt in 2011 of Rebels WA president Nick Martin, who survived being shot, tensions remain ongoing.

descriptions: Redlined Support Crew attacked a Rock Machine ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A former member of the Zig Zag Crew, Fat Corey, who had allied himself with the Rock Machine was heard to make insulting remarks about the Hells Angels. In January 2010, Corey suffered what the police called a 'vicious beating' at the hands of the Redlined Support Crew.

descriptions: Rizzuto crime family brokered a truce between Hells Angels and Rock Machine in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: Vito Rizzuto held a meeting ... attended by both Maurice 'Mom' Boucher, the leader of Hells Angels in Quebec, and Frédéric 'Fred' Faucher, the leader of the Rock Machine, in an attempt to impose a truce.

descriptions: Rock Machine was a member of the Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine were the most visible parts of the Alliance to Fight The Angels

descriptions: After Rock Machine left Bandidos, they became rivals and clashed in Germany in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Tensions between the Bandidos and Rock Machine started in the mid-2000s, with the Shedden Massacre and the dissolution of the Bandidos Canada driving a wedge between the reemerging Rock Machine and their former ally. The rivalry escalated into conflict in 2011, when the two clubs clashed for control of the German city of Ulm.

descriptions: Rock Machine sought help from Bandidos during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rock Machine sought international help from The Bandidos

descriptions: Rock Machine sought to join the Bandidos to gain support against the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Rock Machine seeks help from the Bandidos

descriptions: Rock Machine sought help from the Bandidos during the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Rock Machine sought international help from The Bandidos and local drug dealers.

descriptions: The Rock Machine aligned with the Bandidos and eventually became a probationary club before patching over.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 1999 the Rock Machine Motorcycle Club became a "hang-around" club for the Bandidos.

descriptions: Rock Machine merged with Bandidos in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine merges with the Bandidos in 2001

descriptions: The Rock Machine merged with the Bandidos in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine merges with the Bandidos in 2001

descriptions: Rock Machine became a probationary chapter of the Bandidos, later merging with them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine motorcycle club gained the status of a 'hang-around' club in May 1999 and after eighteen months, became a probationary chapter of the Bandidos Motorcycle Club on 1 December 2000.

descriptions: Rock Machine merged into Bandidos in 2001, becoming a probationary chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rock Machine agreed to join the Bandidos Motorcycle Club based in Texas

descriptions: Rock Machine became a probationary chapter of Bandidos, later full-patch.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine Motorcycle Club gained the status of a "hang-around" club in May 1999 and after eighteen months, became a probationary chapter of the Bandidos Motorcycle Club on 1 December 2000.

descriptions: Rock Machine patched over to become Bandidos Canada in 2001, merging into Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Regardless of the prior issues, on 1 December 2001, the Rock Machine Motorcycle Club became official members of the Bandidos Canada in a "patch-over" ceremony at the Rock Machine's Kingston chapter club house.

descriptions: Rock Machine merged with Bandidos, ceasing to exist as a separate entity.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rock Machine had merged with the Bandidos and was no longer active at the time.

descriptions: Rock Machine killed a member of the Cotroni crime family to gain favor with the Rizzutos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family ... Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

descriptions: The Rock Machine killed a Cotroni family member to gain favor with the Rizzutos, indicating hostility toward the Cotronis.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family. Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

descriptions: Dark Circle financially backed Rock Machine and Pelletier Clan in the Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine would provide the 'muscle' while the Dark Circle would provide the financial backing

descriptions: The Dark Circle employed a hitman who also worked for the Rock Machine, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Gallant was employed by a member of the Dark Circle and also frequently carried out contracts for the Rock Machine during the conflict with the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Rock Machine formed the Alliance with Dark Circle against Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The local Rock Machine Motorcycle Club formed an affiliation, the Alliance, with Montreal crime families such as the Pelletier Clan, Dark Circle and other independent dealers who wished to resist the Hells Angels' attempts to establish a monopoly on street-level drug trade in the city.

descriptions: The Dark Circle worked with the Rock Machine, sharing a hitman who carried out contracts for both.
edges.evidence_quote: Gallant was employed by Michel Duclos, the leader of the Dark Circle, and also frequently carried out contracts for the Rock Machine during the conflict with the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Rock Machine killed a member of Death Riders, a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: They assassinated Pierre Daoust, a member of a Hells Angel support club, the Death Riders Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Salvatore Cazzetta had contacts with the Dubois Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta spoke fluent French, English and Italian and had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family, the West End Gang, and the Dubois Gang.

descriptions: Many Rock Machine members came from the Executeurs.
edges.evidence_quote: The majority of the Rock Machine were former members of the Merciless Riders, the Executeurs and the SS.

descriptions: Rock Machine allied with Gremium MC during European expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: During the club's expansion into Europe, it made an alliance with Gremium MC, one of the largest motorcycle clubs in Germany.

descriptions: Rock Machine and Hells Angels Quebec chapters were engaged in escalating violence.
edges.evidence_quote: escalating violence in eastern Canada between the Rock Machine and the Hells Angels' Quebec chapters

descriptions: Rock Machine and Hells Angels were rivals in the Quebec Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine competed with the Hells Angels for control of the street-level narcotics trade in Quebec.

descriptions: The two clubs were rivals in the Quebec Biker War, fighting for drug trade control.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine competed with the Hells Angels for control of the street-level narcotics trade in Quebec.

descriptions: Rock Machine and Hells Angels were rivals in the Quebec Biker War from 1994 to 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine competed with the Hells Angels for control of the street-level narcotics trade in Quebec.

descriptions: Rock Machine and Hells Angels were rivals competing for drug trade control in Quebec.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine competed with the Hells Angels for control of the street-level narcotics trade in Quebec.

descriptions: Rock Machine allied with Loners Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 2000s, the Rock Machine allied themselves with fellow international Canadian motorcycle club the Loners Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: The Loners aligned with the Rock Machine, showing cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Loners had aligned themselves with the Rock Machine, holding a party in Toronto in June 2000 that was attended by dozens of "machinists".

descriptions: Rock Machine formed an alliance with Loners MC in the 2010s.
edges.evidence_quote: A fellow Canadian-based international motorcycle club, an alliance between the two was established in the 2010s.

descriptions: Rock Machine allied with Manitoba Warriors during expansion into Western Canada in 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: A Native-Canadian gang based in the Canada's prairies, an alliance was formed between the two groups during Rock Machine's expansion into Western Canada in 2008.

descriptions: Many Rock Machine members came from the Merciless Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The majority of the Rock Machine were former members of the Merciless Riders, the Executeurs and the SS.

descriptions: Disgruntled Mongols members joined the reestablished Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine was reestablished by former Bandidos, and disgruntled members of the Mongols Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: The Rock Machine recruited former Outlaws members, indicating a cooperative or absorptive relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2000, the Rock Machine set up in Ontario began recruiting former members of the Outlaws Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Outlaws supported Rock Machine during Quebec Biker War and later formed an official alliance in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws motorcycle club had initially given minor support to the Rock Machine during the Quebec Biker War, The Outlaws were also fighting a conflict with the Hell's Angels during this period. An official alliance would be formed between the resurrected Rock Machine and the Outlaws in Manitoba in 2011.

descriptions: Pagans MC met with Rock Machine in 2011 to establish a friendship.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2011, dozens of the Pagans traveled to the Canadian province of New Brunswick to meet with the several chapters of the Rock Machine and other locals.

descriptions: The Rock Machine and Palmers MC conspired together to murder a Hells Angels leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Serge Cyr was placed under arrest and charged with conspiracy along with 13 others including members of the Rock Machine, Pelletier Clan and Palmers MC for planning the murder of Hells Angels president Maurice "Mom" Boucher.

descriptions: Palmers is a puppet club of Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rock Machine created the Palmers MC, a Rock Machine puppet club

descriptions: Palmers MC was a support club for Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: This led to the creation of the Palmers MC, a Rock Machine MC support club with chapters in Montreal and Quebec City.

descriptions: Both were members of the Alliance to Fight the Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine were the most visible parts of the Alliance to Fight The Angels

descriptions: Rock Machine formed the Alliance with Pelletier Clan against Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The local Rock Machine Motorcycle Club formed an affiliation, the Alliance, with Montreal crime families such as the Pelletier Clan, Dark Circle and other independent dealers who wished to resist the Hells Angels' attempts to establish a monopoly on street-level drug trade in the city.

descriptions: The Rock Machine and Pelletier Clan conspired together to murder a Hells Angels leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Serge Cyr was placed under arrest and charged with conspiracy along with 13 others including members of the Rock Machine, Pelletier Clan and Palmers MC for planning the murder of Hells Angels president Maurice "Mom" Boucher.

descriptions: Rock Machine and Rebels MC became rivals after Rock Machine expanded into Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between the Rock Machine and the Rebels Motorcycle Club started when the Canadian club expanded into Australia.

descriptions: Red Devils MC, as Hells Angels support club, has had incidents with Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: the Red Devils are the official support club of the Hells Angels, they have had several incidents with the Rock Machine.

descriptions: Rock Machine members were convicted of arson attacks against Redlined Support Crew properties.
edges.evidence_quote: On 10 July 2011, a business associated with the Hells Angels and the home of a Redlined Support Crew (Hells Angels puppet gang) were burned down.

descriptions: A Rizzuto capo supported the Rock Machine by selling them drugs and providing a venue.
edges.evidence_quote: one of the Rizzuto capos, Paolo Gervasi was a supporter of the Rock Machine, selling them drugs and reserving a table for them at his strip club.

descriptions: Salvatore Cazzetta had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta spoke fluent French, English and Italian and had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family, the West End Gang, and the Dubois Gang.

descriptions: The Rock Machine killed a Cotroni member to gain favor with the Rizzutos, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

edges.evidence_quote: The majority of the Rock Machine were former members of the Merciless Riders, the Executeurs and the SS.

edges.evidence_quote: A RMMC created support club that was founded in Winnipeg, Manitoba. Serves as an international support club for the Rock Machine with chapters in Canada, Australia and Russia.

descriptions: Rock Machine member introduced an informer to West End Gang for a cocaine deal.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta introduced the informer to Richard Matticks, the brother of Gerald Matticks of the West End Gang.

descriptions: Salvatore Cazzetta had contacts with the West End Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta spoke fluent French, English and Italian and had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family, the West End Gang, and the Dubois Gang.

descriptions: WolfSSChanze is a splinter faction of Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: a splinter faction of the Rock Machine led by Suat Erköse. The faction changed their emblem in 2022.

descriptions: Rock Machine benefited from arrests of Zig Zag Crew, but no direct relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: On 1 December 2009, the Royal Canadian Mounted Police launched Project Divide and arrested 34 people who were all Hells Angels or Zig Zag Crew members. The arrests allowed the Rock Machine to fill the vacuum

descriptions: Rockers MC was involved in the war against Rock Machine on behalf of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: In amidst of the war with Rock Machine, Rockers MC biker Paul "Fon Fon" Fontaine, along with an accomplice, murdered provincial prison guard Pierre Rondeau ...

Nuestra Familia.description: Nuestra Familia is a Mexican-American prison gang originating in Northern California, founded in 1965 at Soledad Correctional Training Facility. It operates both inside and outside prisons, engaging in drug trafficking, extortion, and robbery. The gang is a rival of the Mexican Mafia and has a large influence over the Norteños street gang. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood engaged in a race war with La Nuestra Familia in 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: The Aryan Brotherhood grew quickly in the California prison system and eventually engaged in a race war in 1975 with the other prison gangs such as La Nuestra Familia, and Black Guerilla Family.

descriptions: Nuestra Familia is a rival gang of Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Other rival gangs include the Black P. Stones, Bloods, Crips, D.C. Blacks, and Nuestra Familia.

Shining Path.description: Far-left political party and guerrilla group in Peru, founded in 1969 by Abimael Guzmán. It launched a 'people's war' in 1980 aiming to overthrow the government and establish a New Democracy through guerrilla warfare. Known for extreme brutality, including massacres and violence against peasants, trade unionists, and rivals. Designated as a terrorist organization by Peru, the US, EU, Japan, and Canada. Since Guzmán's capture in 1992, its activity has declined, with remaining factions active in the VRAEM region.

descriptions: Combatant faction succeeded Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Succeeded by: Combatant faction

descriptions: Shining Path influenced the Communist Party of Nepal (Maoist Centre) through its ideology and tactics.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shining Path's ideology and tactics have influenced other Maoist insurgent groups, such as the Communist Party of Nepal (Maoist Centre) and other Revolutionary Internationalist Movement -affiliated organizations.

edges.target: Communist Party of Peru – Huallaga Regional Committee
descriptions: PCP-CRH was a faction of Shining Path active in the Huallaga region.
edges.evidence_quote: the Communist Party of Peru – Huallaga Regional Committee ( PCP-CRH ) was active at the Huallaga region from 2004 until Comrade Artemio's capture in 2012.

edges.target: Communist Party of Peru – Huallaga Regional Committee
descriptions: PCP-CRH is a splinter group of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The three remaining splinter groups based themselves in the VRAEM area: ... - The "Communist Party of Peru – Huallaga Regional Committee" (PCP-CRH), a collective established in 2004 in the Huallaga Valley led by Comrade Artemio.

edges.target: Communist Party of Peru – Red Mantaro Base Committee
descriptions: PCP-CBMR is a faction of Shining Path operating in the Mantaro Valley.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to the MPCP, the Communist Party of Peru – Red Mantaro Base Committee ( PCP-CBMR ) has been operating in the Mantaro Valley since 2001

edges.evidence_quote: The three remaining splinter groups based themselves in the VRAEM area: ... - The "Communist Party of Peru – Red Mantaro Base Committee" (PCP-CBMR), established in 2001 as a base committee in the Mantaro Valley.

descriptions: FUDEPP is a political wing branch of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: It has two main branches, MOVADEF (2009–2024) and FUDEPP

edges.evidence_quote: International affiliation: International Communist League

descriptions: MPCP is the main remaining faction of Shining Path, but distanced itself from Shining Path's legacy in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining faction of the Shining Path, the Militarized Communist Party of Peru ( MPCP ), is active in the VRAEM region of Peru, and it has since distanced itself from the Shining Path's legacy in 2018

descriptions: MPCP is a splinter group of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining group, called the Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP) of about 300 individuals remained in the Valle de los Ríos Apurímac, Ene y Mantaro (VRAEM) region.

descriptions: MOVADEF is a political wing branch of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: It has two main branches, MOVADEF (2009–2024) and FUDEPP

descriptions: Negotiating faction succeeded Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Succeeded by: Negotiating faction

descriptions: EGP is the paramilitary wing of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The People's Guerrilla Army ( Ejército Guerrillero Popular , EGP ) was officially created on 3 December 1982 for the purposes of combat, mobilisation and producing an income for the group.

descriptions: People's Guerrilla Army is a splinter group of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The three remaining splinter groups based themselves in the VRAEM area: - The "People's Guerrilla Army" (ERP) led by the Quispe Palomino brothers.

descriptions: People's Liberation Army is the armed wing of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Armed wing: People's Liberation Army

descriptions: Shining Path split from the Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag.
edges.evidence_quote: Split from: Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag

descriptions: Shining Path split from Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag.
edges.evidence_quote: It was an offshoot of the Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag

descriptions: A Shining Path faction (Proseguir) allegedly allied with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: The group had allegedly made an alliance with the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) in the early 2000s, learning how to use rockets against aircraft.

descriptions: Shining Path was affiliated with the Revolutionary Internationalist Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: International affiliation: Revolutionary Internationalist Movement (defunct)

descriptions: Shining Path is affiliated with the Revolutionary Internationalist Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shining Path's ideology and tactics have influenced other Maoist insurgent groups, such as the Communist Party of Nepal (Maoist Centre) and other Revolutionary Internationalist Movement -affiliated organizations.

descriptions: Sendero Rojo was a faction that split from Shining Path after rejecting Guzmán's peace treaty.
edges.evidence_quote: the Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP) is considered the group's main successor, founded in 1999 by brothers Víctor and Jorge Quispe Palomino after the collapse of Sendero Rojo , the faction that had rejected Guzmán's peace treaty.

descriptions: Sendero Rojo is a splinter faction of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Guzmán's role as the leader of the Shining Path was taken over by Óscar Ramírez ("Comrade Feliciano"), who established Sendero Rojo (or PCP Pro-Seguir), aiming to reorganise the party and to continue the armed struggle while breaking with Guzmán, but not with his ideology.

descriptions: Shining Path fought against MRTA.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shining Path began to fight against Peru's other major guerrilla group, the Túpac Amaru Revolutionary Movement (MRTA)

edges.source: Communist Party of Peru – Red Mantaro Base Committee
edges.target: Communist Party of Ecuador – Red Sun
descriptions: PCP-CBMR has signed documents with Communist Party of Ecuador – Red Sun.
edges.evidence_quote: The group has in the past signed documents with the Communist Party of Ecuador – Red Sun.

descriptions: PKK came to agreements with PPSF to facilitate activities.
edges.evidence_quote: The PKK also managed to come to agreements with the Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine (DFLP), the Fatah of Yassir Arafat or the Palestinian Popular Struggle Front (PPSF) of Samir Ghawshah and also with Masoud Barzani's Kurdistan Democratic Party (KDP) in Iraqi Kurdistan which would facilitate their activities.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PPSF split from PFLP.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1967, Palestinian Popular Struggle Front (PPSF) broke away from the PFLP.

descriptions: Jihad Council is the paramilitary wing of Hezbollah.
edges.evidence_quote: Hezbollah's paramilitary wing is the Jihad Council

descriptions: Jihad Council is a paramilitary wing of Hezbollah.
edges.evidence_quote: Paramilitary wing: Jihad Council , Lebanese Resistance Brigades

descriptions: Jihad Council is Hezbollah's military branch.
edges.evidence_quote: Hezbollah has a military branch known as the Jihad Council

descriptions: The Ortiz Gang followed and was influenced by the Intransigeants of London and Paris.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang is known for its series of burglaries, its influence on the emergence and development of illegalism, following Vittorio Pini's Intransigents of London and Paris
